zh.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Lawson於1480年出生在英國諾圖波藍德可拉苗林頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas de Lawson50歲，母親Isabella Killinghall41歲。他於1499年與Anne Horsley在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1526年7月5日在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年46歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德納費斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Lawson于1480年出生在英国諾圖波藍德可拉苗林頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas de Lawson50岁，母亲Isabella Killinghall41岁。他于1499年与Anne Horsley在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1526年7月5日在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年46岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德納費斯。

nameMeanings.name: Lawson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern English: patronymic ‘son of Lawrence’; see   Law   1. It is also found in Ireland since the 17th century.
Americanized form of Swedish   Larsson   and Danish, Norwegian or North German   Larsen  .

variants.name: Law
meanings: Scottish and northern English: from a Middle English personal name Law(e), a short form of Lawrence .

Scottish and northern English: topographic name for someone who lived near a hill, northern Middle English law (from Old English hlāw, which generally became low in the south and law in the north). Compare Lowe and Lew .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 羅, based on its Cantonese pronunciation, see   Luo   1.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Lawson was born in 1480, in Cramlington, Northumberland, England, his father, Sir Thomas de Lawson, was 50 and his mother, Isabella Killinghall, was 41. He married Anne Horsley in 1499, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 5 July 1526, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Tynemouth, Northumberland, England.

fr.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Lawson est né en 1480, à Cramlington, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Lawson, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Isabella Killinghall, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Anne Horsley en 1499, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 5 juillet 1526, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Tynemouth, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William Lawson 1480 in Cramlington, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas de Lawson 50 und seine Mutter Isabella Killinghall 41. Er hat 1499 in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England Anne Horsley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Juli 1526 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England und wurde in Tynemouth, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Lawson è nato il nel 1480 nel Cramlington, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas de Lawson, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Killinghall, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Anne Horsley nel 1499, nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 5 luglio 1526, nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Tynemouth, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Lawsonが1480年にイギリスノースウンバーランドクラムリントンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Lawsonは50歳，母Isabella Killinghallは41歳であった。1499年にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインでAnne Horsleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1526年7月5日にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで46歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドトイネモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: William Lawson(이)가 1480년 영국 노르스벌랜드 크램링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Lawson(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Killinghall(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1499년 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 Anne Horsley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1526년 7월 5일 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 타이네모우스에 묻혔다.

pt.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Lawson nasceu em 1480, em Cramlington, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Lawson, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Killinghall, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Horsley em 1499, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de julho de 1526, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Tynemouth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Lawson родился в 1480 г. в местности крамлингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Lawson было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Killinghall, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Horsley в 1499 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 5 июля 1526 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности тинемоут, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Lawson nació en 1480, en Cramlington, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas de Lawson, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Isabella Killinghall, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Anne Horsley en 1499, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de julio de 1526, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Tynemouth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
